properties.title: Properties
properties.noSelection: Select a node to view properties
properties.label: Label

welcome.title: Welcome to Digital Circuit Simulator
welcome.content: An interactive logic gate simulator for learning digital circuits through hands-on practice.

addComponent.title: Add Components
addComponent.content: Click component buttons in the left toolbar (such as "AND", "Input", "Output") to add nodes to the canvas.

connect.title: Connect Wires
connect.content: Drag from the output handle on the right side of a node to the input handle on the left side of another node to create connections.

toggle.title: Toggle Signal
toggle.content: Click "Input" nodes to toggle between 0 and 1. High level nodes are highlighted.

simulate.title: Run Simulation
simulate.content: Click "Run" to start simulation and observe how signals propagate through the circuit. Click "Reset" to clear the canvas.

start.title: Start Learning
start.content: Try building a simple AND circuit: add 2 inputs, 1 AND gate, 1 output, connect them, and run the simulation!

kmap.title: K-Map
kmap.hint: Click cells to toggle values for K-map simplification
